name: flow
description: Fracture-flow network items: 'flowplane' (the planar flow domain on joints — contour/label, cracked), 'fknot' (flow knots/nodes — contour pore pressure/head), and 'fblock' (flow blocks). Colour by domain attributes via 'colorby' / 'contour'. Used for hydro-mechanical (joint flow) analyses.

basic_keywords.description: Show or hide the item without removing it.
Colour entities by a scalar/vector/tensor field attribute. See sub-item 'contour'.
Categorical colour entities by an attribute (group, type, state, ...). See sub-item 'colorby'.
Restrict drawing to cracked (failed) joint segments.
Draw filled polygons (faces) rather than wireframe.
Filter which entities are drawn using range elements (see references/range-elements).
Set item transparency (0 opaque .. 100 fully transparent).

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create flowplane contour legend active on
common_usage_patterns.description: Contour the joint flow plane field.

common_usage_patterns.command: plot item create fknot contour legend active on

notes: Probe live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to list top-level keywords, then 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' for sub-options. Keyword sets here are binary-validated against 3DEC 9.0.
flowplane top-level: active, clip, color-list, colorby, contour, cracked, cut, cut-line, label, legend, polygons, range, transparency.
fknot top-level: active, clip, color-by-value, color-list, colorby, contour, contourby, cut, legend, map, mark, pixel-size, range, scale, transparency.
fblock top-level: active, axis, clip, color-list, colorby, cut, legend, polygons, range, rotate, scale, translate, transparency, value.
